execution.canonical_sort: (condition_index, cohort_index) == serial order (bootstrap array order preserved)
execution.note: v2 = performance-only refactor of v1: identical per-cohort science, parallel over independent cohorts + canonical sort before verdict. feature/montage/cache/injections/RouteA/B3/n_boot=200/cohorts=100/seed schedule/gates/alpha/denominators UNCHANGED from v1.

tier1_B3_safety_gating.denominator_rule: DECIDED-only (abstain/invalid -> invalid_frac, capped -> INCONCLUSIVE); COHORT bootstrap upper (subjects sampled within cohort generation; aggregate CI is cohort-level, NOT a formal subject-cluster bound)

tier3_routeA_trial_label_diagnostic.interpretation: transfer diagnostic on a trial-label real substrate; NOT a revalidation of the subject-label synthetic A; cautious/abstaining behavior is consistent with the A-line result but does not alone revalidate A

genuine_contrast_descriptive.note: DESCRIPTIVE only; a real CONCEPT_CONFIRMED is not validated truth

verdict.note: Package verdict driven by TIER1 B3 real-feature safety (gating). Power (TIER2) and Route A (TIER3) REPORTED, non-gating. Red-team re-aggregation required for the final verdict.
